form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (17.25) over 300m at this track. Jumps from the outside. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (17.25) over 300m at this track. Jumps from the outside. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room and brushed the running rail, approaching the finish.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (17.43) at big odds over 300m at this track. Boxed out wide and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (17.43) at big odds over 300m at this track. Boxed out wide and looks safely held.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Briefly encountered the rail after the completion of the event.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (17.59) behind Robell Abby in a Maiden on March 31. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (17.59) behind Robell Abby in a Maiden on March 31. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Turned in a fair debut run over 411m at this track where she settled off the pace and battled on to finish fifth (24.14) and beaten 3.5 lengths. Should be further improved. Has ability and among the chances.
